errors.description: SportKeyResolver::resolve(...) failed to find a Sport with the given slug for the caller's tenant (checks tenant custom + platform seeded, active + historical). Response includes the resolver's search trace.
Same shape as SPORT_KEY_UNRESOLVED for the Discipline level. Frequent trigger: caller supplied a discipline_key that doesn't belong to the resolved sport (e.g. `basketball_3x3` under `football`).
Tenant does not hold `sports_registry_custom` entitlement (Small + Medium locked). Response includes tier + upgrade path to Enterprise.

Reached the `sports_registry_custom_slot` per-entity-type cap. Enterprise default is unlimited so this is rare; only fires when a plan variant introduces a per-type cap. Response includes used + cap + entity type.

Tenant attempted to create a custom Sport with a slug that matches an existing platform-seeded Sport (e.g. tenant tried to create custom slug='football'). The tenant must pick a distinct slug (typically by adding a tenant-specific prefix like 'acme_football').
Same as SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM for Discipline level.
Same as SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM for Position level.

A tenant custom Sport with the same slug already exists on this tenant (the tenant is trying to add a duplicate of their own custom, not colliding with platform). Includes the existing row's id + hints at editing vs creating.

A tenant custom Discipline (or Position) references a parent row that belongs to a different tenant. Only platform-seeded parents OR the caller's own tenant customs are valid targets. Security-relevant — logged with actor + tenant + attempted parent + IP.

Attempted to deactivate OR hard-delete a Sport that still has downstream references (rows in tables listed in config('sports_registry.reconciler.reference_tables') carrying this sport_key). Response includes the reference count per table + suggested migration paths.
Attempted to deactivate a Sport with active Disciplines under it. Deactivate the child Disciplines first (or use --cascade flag on the CLI to sweep the tree).
Attempted to deactivate a Discipline with active Positions under it.
Attempted to hard-delete a platform-seeded row (is_platform_seeded=true, tenant_id NULL). Platform-seeded rows are permanent — deactivate instead. Applies to Sport / Discipline / Position uniformly.

Attempted to change a slug on an existing row. Slugs are IMMUTABLE post-create because downstream Wave 3 rows carry them as strings; renaming would silently orphan every reference. To rename: create a new row with the new slug, migrate every downstream reference, then deactivate the old row.

Attempted to flip is_platform_seeded post-create. This flag is set once (by SportCatalogSeeder for platform rows, always false for tenant-authored rows) and never mutated. Any attempted flip is a system anomaly.

Attempted to change sport_id on a Discipline OR discipline_id on a Position post-create. Parent references are immutable — moving a Discipline between Sports (or Position between Disciplines) reshapes the taxonomy. Create a new row under the new parent + deactivate the old one.
Attempted to change tenant_id on an existing row. Security — cross-tenant migration is never allowed. Applies uniformly to Sport / Discipline / Position.
Sport.category must be one of the enum values: team_sport, individual_sport, racquet, combat, aquatic, winter, cycling, track_field, fitness, recreational.
Sport.gender_typical must be one of: male_only, female_only, mixed, any.
Discipline.format_type must be one of: team, individual, relay, pairs, squads.
Sport.age_range_min > Sport.age_range_max, OR either value outside the platform floor (3) / ceiling (99).
Discipline.player_count_min > Discipline.player_count_max, OR either value outside 1 (min) / 500 (max).
Attempted to create a row with a reserved slug ('platform', 'system', 'admin', 'seeded', 'default', 'any', 'all'). Reserved slugs are used by internal tooling.
Slug does not match `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` — lowercase snake_case, starts with a letter, no hyphens.
Sport.icon must be a valid Iconify identifier (e.g. 'mdi:soccer', 'game-icons:basketball-ball'). Regex: `^[a-z0-9-]+:[a-z0-9-]+$`.

Platform admin attempted to reseed while an active SeedPlatformSportsCatalogJob or ReconcileSportReferencesJob is running. Reseed refuses to overlap with either. Retry after the current job completes.
